changeSet.author: Eugene Kalosha
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO roles (id, name, description) VALUES (210, 'BUS_CONT_MANAGER', 'Business Continuity Manager') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING; INSERT INTO roles (id, name, description) VALUES (211, 'LEGAL_GEN_COUNSEL', 'Legal/General Counsel') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
changeSet.rollback: delete from roles where name = 'BUS_CONT_MANAGER' delete from roles where name = 'LEGAL_GEN_COUNSEL'
